name: Mauritius Mass Finder
update_message_en: A new version of Mauritius Mass Finder is available.
update_message_fr: Une nouvelle version de Trouver une Messe à Maurice est disponible.
notes: Optimized user guide release: adds clearer bilingual search guidance, search examples, improved onboarding, better no-result guidance, metadata cleanup, and preserves validated data integrity, semantic time search, My Churches, Near Me, update flow, and PWA/offline support.
